item.title: Mark Mobius – the “Indiana Jones of investing” who died aged 89
item.description: Mark Mobius was an intrepid emerging-markets investor who made many winning bets in the heat of crises. He will be sorely missed

item.title: Outdoor saunas: How to turn your garden into a spa
item.description: Outdoor saunas are the hot, new wellness must-have. Here's how to buy one.
